acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-recycle SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The Sig is dedicated to managing software package that has been released but will not be maintained in the future.. The SIG has 17 core members and maintains 266 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-recycle SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-recycle SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-recycle SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-recycle SIG maintains 266 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-recycle.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-recycle SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-recycle SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Chen Qide, Cao Zhi, Hou Jian. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
